basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Recruitment 2026: Anna University has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M. Tech in Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Avionics, Aerospace Engineering, Space Science, Bio-Chemistry, Mechanical Engineering
qualification.details: M.E / M. Tech in Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Avionics, Aerospace Engineering, Space Science, Bio-Chemistry, Mechanical Engineering

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is 08th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E / M. Tech degree in Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Avionics, Aerospace Engineering, Space Science, Bio-Chemistry, or Mechanical Engineering to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in Anna University's recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this Anna University recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this Anna University recruitment is Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is CMRG/eOffice E-671131/112.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Anna University.
